## Cow displacement

```{r}
#| label: cow displacement table

cow_displacement_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "cow_displacement_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::cow_displacement(
  hhold_df = cow_displacement_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  animal_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$cow_displacement_animal_var),
  bull_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$cow_displacement_bull_val),
  cow_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$cow_displacement_cow_val),
  steer_heifer_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$cow_displacement_steer_heifer_val),
  calf_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$cow_displacement_calf_val),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)
```
